overall.description: First-person exploration of a decaying abandoned concrete building with debris-strewn floors, peeling walls, and barred windows. The player walks through dark corridors, enters a side room to examine a hole in the floor, and ascends a stairwell with a glass block window. Atmospheric horror game footage with dramatic low-key lighting and overcast weather visible outside.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dark derelict room with debris scattered across the floor. The player moves forward through a doorway into a connecting space, approaching a barred window that reveals an overcast sky outside. The atmosphere is tense and claustrophobic with low lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with barred windows and metal doors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor, passing closed metal doors

entered.detail: closed metal door with peeling paint along the corridor wall
open doorway leading to a small side room

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a long, narrow corridor lined with barred windows on the right that let in diffused daylight. Metal doors line the left wall. The floor is covered with debris and rubble. The camera approaches an open doorway on the left leading to a side room.

scene_state.functional_zone: small room with hole in floor

events.description: enters small side room with rectangular hole in the floor
looks down into the dark hole in the floor

agents.ego_description: entering a small room to examine a dangerous-looking hole in the floor, then turning to exit

entered.detail: rectangular hole in the concrete floor leading to darkness below
small wooden cabinet or nightstand against the wall
pile of rubble and broken plaster in the corner

segments.scene_description: The player enters a small side room containing a disturbing rectangular hole in the floor. The camera looks down into the darkness of the hole before turning back toward the doorway. A small cabinet sits against the wall amid debris piles.

events.description: approaches doorway leading to concrete stairwell

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor toward a stairwell at the end of the hall

entered.detail: dark doorway opening leading to concrete staircase

segments.scene_description: Exiting the side room, the player continues down the debris-strewn corridor. The hallway stretches ahead with more barred windows and metal doors until reaching a dark doorway that leads to a stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with glass block window

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairwell while observing the glass block window at the landing

entered.detail: worn concrete staircase ascending to upper floor
rusted metal handrail along the left side of stairs
large window made of glass blocks allowing diffused light into stairwell

segments.scene_description: The player enters a stark concrete stairwell and begins ascending the steps. A metal railing runs along the left wall. At the landing, a large glass block window diffuses gray daylight into the space. The camera approaches the window as the climb continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a decaying concrete interior that transitions from claustrophobic derelict rooms into a stark, ascending stairwell. It begins in a dark, debris-strewn room, moving through a doorway toward a barred window that reveals a bleak, overcast sky. As the camera advances, the space opens into a long, narrow corridor lined with metal doors and diffused daylight, eventually veering into a small side room to peer down into a dark rectangular hole in the floor. The scene then shifts back into the hallway, gliding past rubble and barred windows before turning into a shadowed doorway. Finally, the camera enters a concrete stairwell and begins to climb, moving past a metal railing toward a large glass block window that fills the landing with gray light.
